# TrustScope

> Paste a public GitHub repo and get a deterministic three-pillar trust report — Security & Supply Chain, Trust & Governance, and Community & Sustainability — with constructive, upstream-friendly fixes and no misleading single score. A reputation surface by Neckarshore AI, made in Germany. Free to read, anonymous, no sign-in required.

## What it is
- [What is TrustScope?](https://trustscope.neckarshore.ai/faq): a deterministic, three-pillar trust report for any public GitHub repository — Security & Supply Chain, Trust & Governance, Community & Sustainability — with no misleading single score
- [How it works](https://trustscope.neckarshore.ai/how-it-works): paste a repo; TrustScope runs the full OpenSSF Scorecard plus public GitHub governance and lifecycle signals, and returns a per-pillar verdict, never averaged into one number
- [Why no single score?](https://trustscope.neckarshore.ai/how-it-works): collapsing security, governance and community into one number hides the exact trade-off an adopter is trying to weigh
- [TrustScope vs the OpenSSF Scorecard](https://trustscope.neckarshore.ai/vs/openssf-scorecard): TrustScope is built on the Scorecard and adds governance + community, reporting a verdict per pillar instead of one 0–10 number

## Audience
- [For adopters](https://trustscope.neckarshore.ai/for/adopters): vet a third-party open-source project before you depend on it
- [For maintainers](https://trustscope.neckarshore.ai/for/maintainers): see and close the trust gaps adopters look for on your own project

## Product
- [FAQ](https://trustscope.neckarshore.ai/faq): accounts, the no-single-score rationale, data sources, privacy, due-diligence notes
- [About](https://trustscope.neckarshore.ai/about): Neckarshore AI, Stuttgart, Germany — the studio behind TrustScope
- [Changelog](https://trustscope.neckarshore.ai/changelog): what shipped and when
- [Source (MIT-licensed, public, self-assessing)](https://github.com/neckarshore-mmps/trustscope): TrustScope runs on itself

## Full text
- [llms-full.txt](https://trustscope.neckarshore.ai/llms-full.txt): concatenated full page text for every URL above, for engines that don't fetch each page individually
